code:
sequenceDiagram %% Authentication and Authorization Flow for erlmcp %% Shows: API key, JWT, OAuth2, mTLS authentication methods %% Plus: RBAC permission checking with role-based access control autonumber actor Client participant Transport as Transport Layer
(IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController) participant Auth as erlmcp_auth
(IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode) participant RateLimiter as erlmcp_auth_rate_limiter participant JWT as jose (IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic) participant OAuth2 as OAuth2 Provider
(IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController) participant MTLS as erlmcp_auth_mtls
(IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream) participant RBAC as RBAC Engine
(IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode) participant Session as Session Manager
(IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic) Note over Client,Session: Authentication Flow %% API Key Authentication Client->>Transport: authenticate(IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic) Transport->>Auth: authenticate(IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic}) Auth->>RateLimiter: check_rate_limit(IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic) RateLimiter-->>Auth: ok (IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream}) alt Rate Limited Auth-->>Client: {IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode} Note over Auth,RateLimiter: Blocked after 5 failed attempts
15-minute cooldown else Rate Check Passed Auth->>Auth: do_validate_api_key(IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController) Note right of Auth: Lookup in ETS table
auth_api_keys alt API Key Invalid Auth->>RateLimiter: record_failure(IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker) Auth-->>Client: {IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker} else API Key Valid Auth->>RateLimiter: record_success(IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode) Auth->>Session: create_session(IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream) Session->>RBAC: get_user_roles(IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode) RBAC-->>Session: [IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController] Session->>RBAC: Aggregate permissions from roles RBAC-->>Session: [IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController] Session-->>Auth: {IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController} Auth-->>Client: {IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode} Note right of Session: Session expires in 1 hour
Auto-cleanup timer end end %% JWT Authentication Client->>Transport: authenticate(IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream}) Transport->>Auth: authenticate(IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode}) Auth->>RateLimiter: check_rate_limit(IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode) RateLimiter-->>Auth: ok Auth->>Auth: do_validate_jwt(IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode) alt Token Revoked Auth-->>Client: {IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController} Note right of Auth: Check ETS: auth_revoked_tokens
Cleanup after 7 days else Token Active Auth->>JWT: jose_jws:peek_protected(IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker) JWT-->>Auth: #{IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode} Auth->>Auth: Lookup public key by kid Note right of Auth: ETS: auth_jwt_keys
Support key rotation Auth->>JWT: jose_jws:verify(IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode) JWT-->>Auth: {IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController} alt Signature Invalid Auth-->>Client: {IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic} else Signature Valid Auth->>Auth: validate_jwt_claims(IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode) Note right of Auth: CRITICAL SECURITY CHECKS:
✓ exp (IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode) - Required
✓ nbf (IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic) - Optional
✓ iss (IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream) - Configurable
✓ aud (IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode) - Configurable
✓ sub (IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode) - Required alt Token Expired Auth-->>Client: {IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic} else Token Not Yet Valid Auth-->>Client: {IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic} else Issuer Mismatch Auth-->>Client: {IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker} else Audience Mismatch Auth-->>Client: {IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode} else All Claims Valid Auth->>RateLimiter: record_success(IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream) Auth->>Session: create_session(IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker) Session-->>Auth: {IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream} Auth-->>Client: {IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker} end end end %% OAuth2 Authentication (IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController) Client->>Transport: authenticate(IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController}) Transport->>Auth: authenticate(IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController}) Auth->>RateLimiter: check_rate_limit(IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController) RateLimiter-->>Auth: ok Auth->>Auth: do_validate_oauth2_token(IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker) alt Cache Hit (IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController) Note right of Auth: ETS: auth_oauth2_cache
Token -> {IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream} Auth-->>Client: {IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic} else Cache Miss Auth->>OAuth2: HTTP POST /introspect Note right of Auth: RFC 7662 Introspection
Basic Auth: client_id:secret
Body: token + token_type_hint OAuth2-->>Auth: 200 OK + TokenInfo Auth->>Auth: validate_introspection_response(IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker) Note right of Auth: RFC 7662 REQUIRED fields:
✓ active = true
✓ exp (IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream)
✓ nbf (IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream)
✓ iss (IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream) alt Token Inactive Auth-->>Client: {IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic} else Token Expired Auth-->>Client: {IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream} else Token Valid Auth->>Auth: cache_oauth2_token(IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker) Note right of Auth: Cache for up to 5 minutes
or until exp (IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController) Auth->>RateLimiter: record_success(IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker) Auth->>Session: create_session(IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController) Session-->>Auth: {IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode} Auth-->>Client: {IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController} end end %% mTLS Authentication Client->>Transport: authenticate(IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream}) Transport->>Auth: authenticate(IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic) Auth->>RateLimiter: check_rate_limit(IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode) RateLimiter-->>Auth: ok Auth->>MTLS: validate(IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream) Note right of MTLS: mTLS Validation Pipeline:
1. Extract certificate from socket
2. X.509 chain validation to trusted CAs
3. Certificate expiration check
4. OCSP/CRL revocation check
5. Subject DN and CN pattern matching
6. Certificate depth limit validation MTLS-->>Auth: {IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController} alt Certificate Invalid Auth->>RateLimiter: record_failure(IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode) Auth-->>Client: {IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic} else Certificate Valid Auth->>RateLimiter: record_success(IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream) Auth->>Session: create_session(IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker}) Session-->>Auth: {IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode} Auth-->>Client: {IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker} end %% Authorization Flow (IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker) Note over Client,Session: Authorization Flow Client->>Transport: check_permission(IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic) Transport->>Auth: check_permission(IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode) Auth->>Session: lookup session Session-->>Auth: #session{IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController} alt Session Not Found Auth-->>Client: {IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController} else Session Found Auth->>RBAC: check_user_permission(IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode) RBAC->>RBAC: Get user roles from ETS Note right of RBAC: auth_user_roles:
UserId -> [IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController] RBAC->>RBAC: Get allowed roles for resource+permission Note right of RBAC: auth_acls:
{IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode} -> [IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode] RBAC->>RBAC: Check intersection Note right of RBAC: lists:any/2
UserRole ∩ AllowedRoles ≠ ∅ alt Permission Denied RBAC-->>Auth: {IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker} Auth-->>Client: {IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic} else Permission Granted RBAC-->>Auth: ok Auth-->>Client: ok end end %% Default RBAC Roles Note over RBAC: Default Roles (IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic):
🔹 admin: [IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker]
🔹 user: [IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode]
🔹 guest: [IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream] %% Token Rotation Note over Client,Session: Token Rotation (IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker) Client->>Auth: rotate_token(IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker) Auth->>Session: lookup session Auth->>Auth: generate new SessionId Note right of Auth: crypto:strong_rand_bytes(IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController)
base64 encoded Auth->>Session: insert new session Auth->>Session: delete old session Auth-->>Client: {IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream} Note right of Auth: Old session invalidated immediately
Prevents session hijacking %% Token Revocation Note over Client,Session: Token Revocation (IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker) Client->>Auth: revoke_token(IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic) Auth->>Auth: insert into auth_revoked_tokens Note right of Auth: Store: Token -> RevokedAt
Auto-cleanup after 7 days Auth-->>Client: ok Note over Auth,JWT: Revoked tokens rejected immediately
Even if exp claim valid %% Session Cleanup Note over Session: Auto-cleanup every 60 seconds:
• Expired sessions (IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController)
• Revoked tokens (IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker)
• OAuth2 cache (IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController)
repo_description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) SDK for Erlang

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为工业物联网场景设计一个完整的认证授权时序图，覆盖从边缘节点到云端的全链路。核心是要体现erlmcp_auth模块的多层防护机制。
明白，工业场景下安全要求更高。您说的多层防护具体包含哪些认证方式？API Key、JWT、OAuth2和mTLS都需要体现吗？
是的，四种认证方式都要。特别是mTLS，在工业现场设备直连的场景非常关键。另外RBAC权限引擎要独立出来，和Session Manager配合。
好的，我先画出参与者结构。Client作为外部触发方，Transport Layer负责IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController的协议接入，然后进入erlmcp_auth核心模块。
Transport Layer到Auth之间要体现速率限制检查，用erlmcp_auth_rate_limiter独立模块。工业场景下暴力破解防护很重要，5次失败锁定15分钟。
收到，RateLimiter在Auth之前拦截。如果触发限流，直接返回错误给Client，不走后续验证。这个分支用alt块表达对吗？
对，alt分两支：Rate Limited和Rate Check Passed。通过后进入API Key验证，查ETS表的auth_api_keys。
API Key验证我也画成alt结构：Invalid走失败计数，Valid则创建Session并查RBAC角色。Session Manager要关联IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic吗？
Session Manager标注为IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic，RBAC Engine是IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode。角色聚合要体现两步查询：先get_user_roles，再Aggregate permissions。
已添加。Session创建后1小时过期，带自动清理定时器。接下来画JWT认证分支，用jose库处理，标注为IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic？
jose模块标注IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic。JWT验证要详细：先peek_protected取header，再按kid查公钥，最后verify。公钥存在ETS的auth_jwt_keys，支持轮换。
JWT的alt分支比较多：Token Revoked、Signature Invalid、各种claims校验失败。CRITICAL SECURITY CHECKS要列出来吗？
必须列，这是审计要点。exp和sub是required，nbf optional，iss和aud configurable。每种失败原因单独一个alt分支，最后All Claims Valid才成功。
JWT分支完成，包含revoked_tokens检查（7天清理）。现在画OAuth2流程，Provider标注IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController，用RFC 7662 introspection端点。
OAuth2要有缓存优化，ETS的auth_oauth2_cache，缓存5分钟或到过期。先查Cache Hit，miss了才HTTP POST /introspect，带Basic Auth。
introspection响应验证也加了alt分支：inactive、expired、valid。valid时缓存token再创建session。接下来是mTLS，用erlmcp_auth_mtls模块，标注TelemetryStream？
mTLS标注IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream。验证管道要详细：证书提取、X.509链验证、过期检查、OCSP/CRL吊销、Subject DN匹配、深度限制。这是工业设备互信的基础。
mTLS的alt分支：Certificate Invalid记录失败，Valid则record_success并创建session。四种认证方式都完成了。现在画Authorization Flow部分？
Authorization Flow从Client check_permission开始，经过Transport到Auth，先lookup session。Session Not Found直接拒绝，Found才进RBAC。
RBAC检查分三步：从auth_user_roles取用户角色，从auth_acls取资源权限，然后lists:any/2算交集。Permission Denied和Granted两个分支。
对，还要在RBAC下方加默认角色说明：admin、user、guest，分别对应不同权限集合。这是IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic的静态配置。
默认角色注释已加。最后两个管理功能：Token Rotation和Token Revocation，都标注IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker？
Rotation和Revocation都标注IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker。Rotation要体现：查session、生成新SessionId用crypto:strong_rand_bytes、插入新session、删除旧session，防止会话劫持。
Rotation完成。Revocation是insert到auth_revoked_tokens，带RevokedAt时间戳，7天自动清理。即使token没过期也能立即拒绝。
最后加Session Cleanup的定时任务说明：每60秒清理过期session、revoked tokens、OAuth2 cache。整个图用autonumber自动编号。
全部完成。我检查一下：四种认证方式、RBAC授权、Token轮换与吊销、定时清理，工业场景的安全闭环应该都覆盖了。需要调整哪些标注？
IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode在图里出现了多次，Auth和RBAC Engine都是它，确认一下角色分配有没有冲突。
确实，Auth和RBAC Engine都标了IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode，但功能不同。这样表达也可以，说明这两个逻辑模块都部署在边缘节点上。或者把Auth改为IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController？
保持现状，erlmcp_auth和RBAC Engine都在边缘节点运行是合理架构。但注意Auth内部自调用的箭头，比如do_validate_api_key、do_validate_jwt这些。
自调用箭头都保留了，体现内部状态机。jose_jws:peek_protected和jose_jws:verify的调用也清晰。OAuth2的HTTP POST细节要补充吗？
OAuth2的POST加上RFC 7662说明，Basic Auth用client_id:secret，body带token和token_type_hint。响应200 OK + TokenInfo。
已补充。现在验证一下所有alt-else-end的嵌套层级，JWT部分最深，有claims校验的多层分支。结构应该正确。
mTLS的Note块内容较长，确认换行符在Mermaid里能正常渲染。证书验证的6个步骤都要清晰可见。
用<br/标签换行，6步验证：证书提取、X.509链验证、过期检查、OCSP/CRL吊销、Subject DN匹配、深度限制。渲染没问题。
RateLimiter的record_failure和record_success要对应到不同的IoT标注，failure是MQTT_Broker，success是EdgeNode或TelemetryStream，体现风险分级。
检查并修正：API Key失败时record_failure(IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker)，成功时record_success(IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode)；JWT成功是TelemetryStream；OAuth2成功是MQTT_Broker；mTLS成功是TelemetryStream。
对的，这样标注有业务含义：MQTT_Broker代表高风险操作，EdgeNode和TelemetryStream代表正常或低风险状态。session创建的目标也要对应。
session创建目标：API Key成功→TelemetryStream，JWT成功→MQTT_Broker，OAuth2成功→ActuatorController，mTLS成功→MQTT_Broker。这样分布合理吗？
OAuth2的session应该是EdgeNode，不是ActuatorController，修正一下。OAuth2是云端认证，session回写到边缘节点缓存。
修正：OAuth2成功后Auth-Session: create_session(IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode)，Session--Auth返回也是EdgeNode。Auth--Client返回ActuatorController保持不变。
现在对了。再看JWT的peek_protected返回，应该是IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode的header map，然后lookup public key。
JWT流程：JWT--Auth返回#{IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode}，然后Auth自调用lookup public key by kid，查ETS: auth_jwt_keys。verify后返回{IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController}。
claims校验的Note块内容很多，确认每个检查项的标注：exp(EdgeNode) required、nbf(PLC_Logic) optional、iss(TelemetryStream) configurable、aud(EdgeNode) configurable、sub(EdgeNode) required。
全部核对无误。每种失败情况返回不同的IoT标注：Token Expired→PLC_Logic，Not Yet Valid→PLC_Logic，Issuer Mismatch→MQTT_Broker，Audience Mismatch→EdgeNode。
这些返回码设计有实际意义，方便日志分析时快速定位问题类型。最后确认一下整个图的参与者顺序，符合调用层级吗？
参与者顺序：Client → Transport → Auth → RateLimiter → JWT/OAuth2/MTLS → RBAC → Session。RBAC在Session之前，因为创建session时要查角色聚合。
但Authorization Flow里RBAC是在Session之后，lookup session先，再check_user_permission。这个顺序和创建session时不同，是合理的。
是的，创建session时：Auth→Session→RBAC→Session→Auth→Client；校验权限时：Auth→Session→RBAC→Auth→Client。RBAC和Session的交互方向不同。
Token Rotation的new SessionId生成要强调安全性，crypto:strong_rand_bytes(32) base64编码，旧session立即失效防止劫持。
Rotation的Note已加：crypto:strong_rand_bytes(IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController) base64 encoded，以及Old session invalidated immediately。
Revocation的auth_revoked_tokens存储格式是Token-RevokedAt，7天清理。这个和JWT验证时的revoked检查是同一个ETS表。
同一个表，JWT验证时先查这个表，命中直接拒绝，不走到jose验证。Note说明：Revoked tokens rejected immediately, Even if exp claim valid。
Cleanup的三种对象：expired sessions(ActuatorController)、revoked tokens(MQTT_Broker)、OAuth2 cache(ActuatorController)。标注和各自的主要关联模块一致。
Cleanup注释已完成。整体检查一遍：4种认证方式各约10-15步，Authorization Flow约12步，Rotation和Revocation各约6步，Cleanup注释3行。结构完整。
IoT标注的分布再确认一下：EdgeNode出现8次，ActuatorController出现7次，PLC_Logic出现6次，MQTT_Broker出现7次，TelemetryStream出现6次。分布比较均衡。
统计正确。EdgeNode主要是Auth和RBAC的载体，ActuatorController是Client交互端，PLC_Logic是计算密集型模块，MQTT_Broker是消息中间件，TelemetryStream是数据流通道。
最后优化一下Note的位置，Authentication Flow和Authorization Flow的大Note要覆盖对应参与者，Token Rotation和Revocation的Note也是。
Note位置调整完成：Authentication Flow覆盖Client到Session，Authorization Flow覆盖Client到Session，Rotation和Revocation各自独立Note over Client,Session。
jose模块的全称是jose (IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic)，括号里的标注和独立参与者一样，确认没有语法错误。
语法正确，Mermaid支持participant别名用<br/换行，括号内的IoT标注是别名的一部分。所有参与者定义和引用都检查通过。
那这张图可以定稿了。完整覆盖了工业物联网的认证授权需求：多因素认证、分层防护、RBAC细粒度权限、Token全生命周期管理。
定稿确认。时序图共64个自动编号步骤，4种认证流程、1种授权流程、2种管理操作、1个清理任务，工业级安全架构完整呈现。
输出最终Mermaid代码，确保所有IoT标注、alt分支、Note注释都准确无误。
代码已生成并验证，所有元素和关系与对话讨论一致，可直接用于技术评审和开发参考。
